title: Hidden Helms
description: Helmet-hiding resource pack that reveals the face of the player.
body:
**Description:**

Have you ever wanted to look at someone's face while they wear armor but noticed it's a little hard with that helmet in the way? If so, this resource pack may be for you. As the title implies, the resource pack makes all vanilla helmets hidden/invisible. That way, you can see everyone's gorgeous face.

Want to install it on bedrock? Head over to [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/hidden-helms/)!
